comment: CIP-30 functional test fixtures generated by scripts/gen-fixtures.sh from a fixed throwaway test mnemonic. Expected verdicts derive from the signing construction and cardano-signer verify --cip30 (the independent oracle), never from this library. Do not edit by hand; re-run moon run gen-fixtures.
mnemonic: test walk nut penalty hip pave soap entry language right filter choice

fixtures.name: plain_enterprise_mainnet
fixtures.description: Plaintext payment-key signature, mainnet enterprise address.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: signed M with payment key over its own mainnet enterprise address; cardano-signer verify --cip30 = true

fixtures.name: plain_enterprise_testnet
fixtures.description: Plaintext payment-key signature, testnet enterprise address.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: signed M with testnet payment key over its own enterprise address; cardano-signer verify --cip30 = true

fixtures.name: hashed_embedded
fixtures.description: Hashed (blake2b-224) payload embedded in the COSE_Sign1.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: signed --hashed M; embedded payload is blake2b-224(M); cardano-signer verify --cip30 = true

fixtures.name: detached_plain
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: signed --nopayload M; payload reconstructed from M; cardano-signer verify --cip30 = true

fixtures.name: detached_hashed
fixtures.description: Detached AND hashed signature: the section-7 correctness case. Our verifier reconstructs the raw 28-byte blake2b-224(M), diverging from the reference's apparent UTF-8-of-hex-digest bug.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: signed --hashed --nopayload M; payload reconstructed as raw blake2b-224(M); cardano-signer verify --cip30 = true (confirms our divergence from the reference is correct)

fixtures.name: reward_stake_mainnet
fixtures.description: Plaintext stake-key signature, mainnet reward (stake) address.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: signed M with stake key over its own reward address; matches via the stake credential; cardano-signer verify --cip30 = true

fixtures.name: negative_wrong_message
fixtures.description: Valid signature checked against the WRONG message: Valid() must be false.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: valid sig, but we hand the library a different message at test time (see messageOverride); cardano-signer verify with that wrong --data = false
fixtures.messageOverride: this is not the message that was signed

fixtures.name: negative_wrong_address
fixtures.description: Valid signature checked against a FOREIGN address: Valid() must be false.
fixtures.message: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace
fixtures.derivedFrom: valid sig, but the foreign address shares neither credential of the signing key; cardano-signer verify --address <foreign> = false
